name: rmuti-surin-loan-system
description: Loan debtor management system for RMUTI Surin Campus

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.lint: npm --prefix frontend run lint && npm --prefix backend run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix backend run typecheck && npm --prefix frontend run typecheck
